mapper.select: select count(1) from ( select 1 from shebao_land_loss_resident where subsidy_person_id = #{subsidyPersonId} and del_flag = '0' limit 1 union all select 1 from shebao_expropriatee_subsidy where subsidy_person_id = #{subsidyPersonId} and del_flag = '0' limit 1 union all select 1 from shebao_demolition_resident where subsidy_person_id = #{subsidyPersonId} and del_flag = '0' limit 1 union all select 1 from shebao_village_official where subsidy_person_id = #{subsidyPersonId} and del_flag = '0' limit 1 ) t
